steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At $m=0$, the rewards program has $600$ customers. That means the model must start with $600$.

steps.title: Use the growth factor
steps.content:
A $6\%$ increase means each month multiplies the previous total by $1+0.06=1.06$. After $m$ months, the model is
$$c=600(1.06)^m$$
The answer is B.
